assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks in Phase 1 covering cluster versions, node status, cluster health, and deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 2 provides the exact command: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)" | grep "1\.33"'

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 3 includes both kubectl metrics check and gcloud recommender insights commands to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 7 provides the exact command with --master flag: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Steps 8 and 9 include verification commands with expected output showing 1.33.x version and system pod health checks

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 11 and 14 provide exact gcloud commands for node pool upgrades, though it does single-level (1.32→1.33) rather than skip-level which is appropriate for this scenario

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 12 and 15 provide specific monitoring commands including 'watch kubectl get nodes' and operations list commands

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Response provides sequential upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for both control plane and node pools, which is appropriate for single minor version upgrade

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation checks covering cluster versions, node status, pod health, and kube-system components

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes both troubleshooting section for common issues and rollback section with specific commands for creating new pools at previous version
